productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Raw Wash Navy Blue Jeans
description: Style Note See the charmingly casual image of his father in your little boy with these comfortable and well fitted jeans from palm tree. Pair it with a colourful T-shirt and some comfortable sneakers and enjoy watching him take on the world. Product Details Blue jeans with a button and zipped closure, has two insert pockets in the front with a small coin pocket on the right side, two patch pockets at the back with decorative stitching and a waistband that is elasticated at the back and has loops for a belt Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent with like colours Wash and dry inside out Do not tumble dry Do not iron on decor Use warm iron
